indexes.name: payplans_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX payplans_pkey ON public.payplans USING btree (id)

indexes.name: idx_payplans_name

relations.def: FOREIGN KEY (payplan_id) REFERENCES payplans(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (period_id) REFERENCES payplan_periods(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (entry_id) REFERENCES payplan_entries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (funding_id) REFERENCES fundings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (period_id) REFERENCES funding_periods(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (entry_id) REFERENCES funding_entries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (government_funding_id) REFERENCES government_fundings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (period_id) REFERENCES government_funding_periods(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (entry_id) REFERENCES government_funding_entries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

driver.name: postgres
driver.database_version: PostgreSQL 18.1 on x86_64-pc-linux-musl, compiled by gcc (Alpine 15.2.0) 15.2.0, 64-bit
